div.p: Messages persisted before crash are recovered by replaying the log. Invariant: Offset > minCommitted are requeued to restore state.
Offset Filter Logic Compare each entry's offset against minimum committed offset across all groups.
CRC32 Checksum Detects: bit flips, partial writes, disk corruption. Action: skip with warning, continue.
Offset Comparison minCommittedOffset = minimum across all consumer groups for this topic.
Recovery Invariant Messages at or before committed offset are NOT requeued (already processed by at least one consumer).

g.title: Init memory buffers, network stack, and storage handles
Init memory buffers, network stack, and storage handles
